name: Fish Kabobs
recipeInstructions: Combine 1/4 cup vinegar, 1/2 cup oil, 1 teaspoon salt, 1 pinch cayenne, 1/4 teaspoon pepper, and 1/4 teaspoon powdered mustard to make a marinade. Marinate the fish for at least 1 hour. Thread the marinated fish alternately with fruit and vegetables onto skewers. Brush the kebabs with remaining marinade. Place on grill 4 inches above coals. Cook until edges of fish begin to curl.
